chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abd Al-Wahid Ibn Muhammad Ibn Abdus Al-Nisaburi

text: و ما كان فيه عن عبد الواحد بن محمّد بن عبدوس النيسابوريّ فقد رويته عنه‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Abd Al-Wahid ibn Muhammad ibn Abdus Al-Nisaburi, I have narrated it from him.
